Variables.Name: DeviceType
Variables.Description: The type of this profile, I.e. IOS, Windows, PS4 etc

Variables.Name: BaseProfileName
Variables.Description: The name of the parent profile of this object

Variables.Name: Parent
Variables.Description: The parent object of this profile, it is the object matching this DeviceType with the BaseProfileName

Variables.Name: CVars
Variables.Description: The collection of CVars which is set from this profile
